title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind unveiled Gemini 3 with upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use capabilities. The announcement showcases new workflows for building agentic applications through Vertex AI integration and highlights research advancements driving agent design.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech covers the Gemini 3 announcement from Google DeepMind, focusing on upgraded model reasoning, an expanded context window, and improved multimodal tool use. The video walks through new workflows for building agentic applications via Vertex AI integration and points to research advances shaping agent design. The takeaways: Gemini 3 adds capacity for handling larger inputs and coordinating tools across modalities, and Vertex AI provides the path to assemble multi-agent systems from these capabilities.
